response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify scenes, finding a distinct talk segment, a short song performance, and an ending graphic. 2. Identified the song title as 'Ridin' on Dreams' and the artist as 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' using on-screen information. 3. Used web searches to find the full lyrics of the song in Japanese. 4. Constructed the JSON object, including the full Japanese lyrics for the song.
response.global_summary: The video captures a snippet of a Hololive concert, featuring banter and interaction between two VTuber performers, followed by a short vocal performance of the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' and an ending screen.

scenes.description: The two VTubers talk to the audience and make announcements. No vocal music is playing.
The VTubers perform a segment of the song 'Ridin' on Dreams'. The song is an original track by the hololive IDOL PROJECT.
